# Signpost

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Signpost;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Signpost { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
navigation, direction, arrow, wayfinding, guide, location, pointer, route, indicator, marker, bidirectional, left, right, east, west

## Categories
arrows, navigation, development, gaming
